name: All-Star Pawn
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Haltom City, TX offering collateral-based loans, gold/jewelry sales, firearms, and used merchandise retail. Also buys houses.
description_long:
All-Star Pawn is a family-owned and operated pawn shop located in Haltom City, Texas (Fort Worth area) that has built its business on providing fast cash loans against personal items. The shop was founded on the principle of offering accessible financial solutions to the local community, positioning itself as a neighborhood alternative to traditional lending.

The company's core service is pawn loans—customers bring items of value, receive a loan, and have 60 days to repay and reclaim their property. All-Star Pawn accepts a wide range of collateral including gold, jewelry, diamonds, watches, firearms, electronics, game systems, tools, motorcycles, dirt bikes, and guitars. Beyond lending, they operate a retail operation selling used merchandise at discounted prices. Notably, the business has expanded into real estate, claiming to buy houses directly from people facing difficult financial situations in Haltom City and surrounding areas.

All-Star Pawn emphasizes customer service and staff expertise. Their website features multiple customer testimonials praising the friendliness and helpfulness of staff, fair appraisals, and a stress-free process. The shop also highlights that it is "strictly regulated" and maintains rigorous inventory controls to ensure no stolen merchandise is sold, positioning this as a trust differentiator. They offer multilingual support (English, Spanish, Vietnamese) and maintain extended hours during economic hardship periods.

As a pawn shop, this business is fundamentally a collateral-based lending service, which means borrowers must own items of sufficient value and must repay within the stated timeframe or lose their collateral. While convenient for immediate cash needs, pawn loans lack the consumer protections of regulated lenders and typically carry implicit interest rates (through the gap between loan and item resale value). The house-buying service, while potentially helpful in crisis situations, requires careful due diligence from consumers.
address: 3901 Old Denton Rd #100, Haltom City, TX 76117

company_info.headquarters: 3901 Old Denton Rd #100, Haltom City, TX 76117

pros: Same-day or next-day cash availability on pawn loans—customers receive funds within minutes
Wide range of accepted collateral (gold, jewelry, firearms, electronics, tools, vehicles, and more)
No credit check required; lending based on item value rather than creditworthiness
Retail inventory of pre-owned merchandise at discounted prices available for purchase
Multiple customer reviews praising staff friendliness, fair appraisals, and low-pressure service
Strictly regulated inventory controls and commitment to avoiding stolen goods
Multilingual support (English, Spanish, Vietnamese) serving diverse community
Extended hours and commitment to serving customers during economic hardship
cons: Pawn loans lack regulatory consumer protections common in licensed lending; implicit interest rates can be steep depending on resale value
Risk of permanent loss of collateral if loan is not repaid within 60-day window—items are sold if redemption deadline is missed
House-buying service lacks transparency on terms; potential for predatory pricing in crisis situations
No mention of loan terms, interest rates, or fees on website; customers must visit in person or call for pricing
Limited ability to help customers who lack items of sufficient value to secure needed loan amounts
best_for: People who need immediate cash (within hours) and own items of significant resale value
Individuals without access to credit or with poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Homeowners in financial crisis looking to sell property quickly without listing on open market
Customers buying used merchandise at discounted retail prices
diagnosis: All-Star Pawn is best for people facing immediate cash emergencies who own items of significant resale value and can reliably repay within 60 days. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are inherently risky—failure to repay results in permanent loss of collateral, and the implicit interest rates (determined by the gap between loan amount and resale value) can be substantial, making this a more expensive option than traditional lending or credit alternatives for borrowers who qualify.
services: Pawn loans against personal collateral (60-day redemption period)
Gold and jewelry appraisal and purchasing (including scrap/broken gold and silver)
Firearms sales (new and used) with accessories, ammunition, and safety equipment
Jewelry and watches buying and pawning
Electronics buying and pawning (televisions, game systems, etc.)
Tools, motorcycles, and dirt bikes buying and pawning
Musical instruments (guitars and others) buying and pawning
Used merchandise retail sales at discounted prices
Direct house buying in Haltom City and surrounding areas
Free item appraisals with no obligation
